name: naiveproxy
note: Apache-2.0. NaiveProxy is the anti-tracking architecture this server speaks. The server side is now sing-box's `naive` inbound (since the v0.0.2 pivot — the legacy Caddy `forwardproxy` plugin path is no longer part of this image); the client side is the naive binary bundled in the cool-tunnel client family. Both halves live under the klzgrad/naiveproxy project umbrella. The verify probe greps the rendered /etc/sing-box/config.json (mounted into the panel container via the singbox_etc volume) for a `"type": "naive"` inbound, confirming the proxy backend is configured. (v0.0.34 — the prior `caddy list-modules` verify referred to the legacy architecture and ran inside the panel container which has no `caddy` CLI.)
